emails.subject: Re: Analysis of last year's errors
emails.body_summary: Jordan, can we finalize the corrective measures for the Q2 meeting?

meetings.title: Q2 Operational Corrections Discussion
meetings.transcript_summary: Discussion on identifying and correcting last year's transaction errors.
meetings.description: A meeting to layout strategies for addressing identified transaction errors.

commitments.description: Review details of last year’s transaction errors with Jordan

operational_insights.title: Risk Assessment of 2025 Transaction Errors
operational_insights.summary: High risk due to duplicated transactions in September.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Initiate a detailed audit and implement corrective actions.
operational_insights.explanation: Errors from September were not addressed, causing potential operational risk.

operational_insights.title: Old Summary Contradicting New Insights
operational_insights.summary: Previous reports suggested minor issues without recognizing duplication.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Review and amend past incorrect entries.
operational_insights.explanation: Contradicts new findings regarding same-day duplications.

expected_answer_facts: Corrective measures include a comprehensive audit.
Identified critical risk due to September errors.
Past reviews underestimated impact of duplicate transactions.
